settings.heading: DESCRIPTION
settings.content: The overnight fix: Our hydrogel nail patches work while you sleep, no mess, no smell. Packed with targeted ingredients that fight fungus, smooth texture, and fade discoloration, these patches deliver real results without creams, pills, or drama. 21 patches and one mission: healthier nails.

settings.heading: how to use
settings.content:
1. Clean and Dry Your Nail
  2. Stick Patch Over The Problem Area
  3. Go To Bed, Wake up To Progress

No Mess, No Oder, Zero Interruptions.

settings.text:
In just 5 seconds before bed, you apply the patch and forget about it.

While you sleep, it delivers natural ingredients straight to the nail, working overnight so you wake up one step closer to healthy nails.
Our patches use a moisture-locking formula that softens, hydrates, and helps break down fungal buildup fast all in just one simplistic odor and mess free patch.

settings.custom_liquid:
Doctor-Developed Nail Fungus Relief – Without the Harsh Side Effects.

Jolie isn't just another over-the-counter cream or prescription—it's the result of years of research by Dr. Amanda.

A holistic skin expert who has dedicated his career to studying how natural compounds impact the skin, nerves, and immune system.

His breakthrough formula uses a targeted blend of 17 natural ingredients to penetrate deep into the nail bed, clear the infection at its root, and support healthy recovery.

Restore the healthy, clear look of your nails – without the side effects common with unreliable drugstore products.

frequently asked questions

The Changing Foundation offers buildable, light to medium coverage that effortlessly adapts to your needs. Start sheer for an everyday natural look, or layer for more coverage — it's completely in your control.

Yes. The Changing Foundation is dermatologist tested and formulated to be gentle on sensitive skin, including those with conditions like rosacea or vitiligo. We always recommend doing a patch test first, as individual reactions can vary.

Absolutely. The lightweight, moisturizing formula is specifically designed to glide over fine lines and crepey skin without settling into them. It hydrates as it covers, leaving skin looking naturally smooth and even — never cakey or heavy.

For best results, apply with a brush — this helps the pigment particles blend deeper into the skin and prevents any white cast. You can also use fingers or a sponge. Start from the center of your face and blend outward in circular motions.

The formula contains encapsulated pigments that start off white. As you blend, friction and your skin's natural warmth break open those capsules, releasing warm pigment that adjusts to your unique skin tone. The result is a seamless, custom shade match — every time.
